channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Stingrays at Tropicana Field relocated to The Florida Aquarium after hurricane damage
item.description: The stingrays at Tropicana Field have moved to a new home after the stadium sustained significant damage from Hurricane Milton last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Texas' dominant defense will be tested by No. 5 Georgia and senior QB Carson Beck
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — By any measure, from the official statistics to the informal eye test, top-ranked Texas' defense has been dominant. The Longhorns rank No. 1 in total defense and scoring defense. They are top 10 in first downs allowed, tackles for loss and passing yards.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dodgers' Flaherty shares NLCS Game 1 'moment' with mother
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers' major trade-deadline acquisition from this summer is already worth it. Jack Flaherty was the star of the show in Game 1 of the NLCS between L.A. and the New York Mets, as he pitched an electric seven shutout innings while giving up just two hits in a 9-0 win.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Brandon Nimmo in Mets' lineup for Game 2 of NLCS despite left foot issue
item.description: Brandon Nimmo is in the New York Mets’ lineup for Game 2 of the National League Championship Series despite dealing with plantar fasciitis in his left foot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: College Football Playoff projections: Oregon earns the Big Ten’s AQ spot and the deliciously chaotic Army-Navy issue
item.description: The only thing crazier than Vanderbilt beating Alabama would be Army and Navy colliding with a CFP berth at stake.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Cam Rising out indefinitely with lower leg injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising's return to the field lasted all of one game. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham announced on Monday that Rising is "out indefinitely" after suffering a lower leg injury on the first series in Friday's 27-19 loss at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: MLB playoffs averaging 3.33 million viewers through division series, an 18% increase over last year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Major League Baseball's postseason is averaging 3.33 million viewers going into the league championship series, an 18% increase over last year's average of 2.82 million. The division series averaged 3.56 million viewers for 18 games, a 14% increase from last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WNBA and players' union closing in on opt out date for current collective bargaining agreement
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA had a record year in terms of growth in viewership and attendance, and with that the players now want a bigger piece of the financial pie. The players union and league have until Nov. 1 to potentially opt out of their current collective bargaining agreement.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Army, Navy football teams together in AP Top 25 poll for 1st since 1960
item.description: Army and Navy football programs each were ranked in the Associated Press Top 25 poll for the first time sine 1960 on Sunday. Both teams are undefeated.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kansas tops AP Top 25 preseason men's basketball poll ahead of Alabama, defending champion UConn
item.description: Kansas was picked first in the AP Top 25 preseason men’s basketball poll Monday, getting the No. 1 nod on half of the 60 ballots from a national media panel to start the season ahead of Alabama and two-time defending national champion UConn. Kansas scooped up 30 first-place votes from the AP panel.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers: Week 7
item.description: The seventh week of the 2024 college football season came and went on Saturday. The grueling matchups yielded these winners and losers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackson outduels Daniels and Henry runs for two TDs as Ravens beat Commanders 30-23
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson threw nine passes to Zay Flowers in the first half and never went to him again. Mark Andrews rebounded from a ball bouncing off his hands for an interception to catch his first touchdown pass of the season. And Derrick Henry was Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Winners of the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon
item.description: Runners from across the world gathered in Chicago Sunday for the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ronaldo scores again in Nations League win for perfect Portugal. Spain finds replacement for Rodri
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored his record-extending 133rd international goal to keep Portugal perfect in the Nations League with a 3-1 win over Poland on Saturday, and Spain struck late to edge Denmark 1-0.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Penn State makes its first west coast Big Ten trip to USC
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- It's not your granddaddy's Big Ten anymore and this week's conference lineup is the people's exhibit A. Minnesota heads to UCLA, Ohio State is at Oregon, and Penn State heads to USC. Three games that hardly feel like Big Ten conference play.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Cam Rising to start tomorrow at Arizona State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Cam Rising is ready to return to the field. According to a report by ActionNetwork's Brett McMurphy, Rising will start at quarterback for the #16 Utah football team tomorrow night at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How much are Padres tickets?
item.description: Are you hoping to cheer on the Padres from the stands of Petco Park for Game 4 of the National League Division Series?
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Raccoon sparks chaos in stands during Broncos game against Raiders
item.description: Football fans packed Empower Field in Denver on Sunday to watch the Broncos take on the Las Vegas Raiders, but they weren’t the only ones in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5
